\tzpentry{ID3550}{Concept Units Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3550 introduces Concept Units Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \nabla_\mu = e_\mu \partial_\mu = (e_t, e_x, e_y, e_z) \]
